name: Mebeverine
description: Mebeverine has been investigated for the treatment of Irritable Bowel Syndrome and Post-cholecystectomy Gastrointestinal Spasms.

interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Mebeverine can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.

interactions.name: Pregabalin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Mebeverine can be decreased when used in combination with Pregabalin.

interactions.name: Mianserin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Mebeverine can be decreased when used in combination with Mianserin.

interactions.name: Orlistat
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Mebeverine can be decreased when it is combined with Orlistat.
